name: Fairway's Indoor Golf
about: Fairway's Indoor Golf is an indoor golf studio that provides a tranquil environment for players of all skill levels to enjoy golf regardless of weather conditions. The facility offers club rentals, range balls, game balls, tees, and gloves, and features world-famous courses and driving ranges. Players can fix their slice, dial in their clubs, or challenge friends, with courses selected by staff based on current events and holidays. The venue is equipped with launch monitors that may misread practice swings as hits, and the application of rules is subject to the discretion of scorekeepers and event-workers.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to world-famous golf courses and driving ranges in an indoor setting
Tranquil environment for finding your Zen in golf
Advanced launch monitor technology for accurate ball and club tracking
Variety of amenities including club rentals and game accessories
Ideal for both serious practice and fun with friends

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned, BYOB not specified
No alcohol service mentioned, BYOB not specified

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor with ball and club tracking, may misread practice swings as hits
